metadata.description: Subset of 10 healthcare requests for RQ2 experiments, stratified by density (3L+4M+3H) and covering all constraint categories, resolvability levels (Implicit/Vague/Borderline), and importance levels (Critical/Useful) via their gold annotations.

requests.request: Book a tooth extraction near Feuersee next Tuesday.
Arrange a routine eye exam in Frankfurt. I need it for my driving license application.
My child needs an MMR vaccination in Berlin during the first weekend of next month, preferably later in the afternoon, at a clinic in the Charlottenburg district.
Schedule a fasting blood glucose test at a lab in Berlin tomorrow early in the morning.
Find a hospital in Stuttgart starting next week for an elbow injury after a fall. I might need imaging during the same visit.
Schedule an orthopedic consultation in Berlin next week at a clinic where I can also get an MRI done later if needed, and it should be easy to reach from Alexanderplatz.
Book an abdominal ultrasound in Berlin next Wednesday afternoon before my gastroenterology follow-up on 4 June 2026. I would prefer a clinic near Alexanderplatz.
Schedule a post-op wound check in Hamburg two weeks after my knee surgery on 10 June 2026.
Book a physiotherapy session in Cologne. I use a wheelchair, so getting into the building and moving around inside should not be difficult.
Schedule a physiotherapy session in Frankfurt next week. I would like to get the earliest possible appointment even if it means paying privately.
